title: Add integration tests for withAuth HOC and protected route access control
description: Write unit tests for the `withAuth` HOC verifying it returns 401 for missing/invalid tokens and 403 for insufficient roles. Write integration tests covering the full end-to-end auth flow: register → login → access protected route → refresh token → logout. Tests should cover all 15 routes currently wrapped with `withAuth`, including role-restricted routes (enroll requires viewer/admin, admin-stats requires admin, notes POST requires admin/editor).
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.test.ts — vi.mock('@/getPayload'), JwtService instantiation, mockPayload.find/update pattern with beforeEach+vi.clearAllMocks()
src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts — unit tests for auth middleware using UserStore+SessionStore+JwtService to create authenticated context; tests 401/expired/revoked/generation mismatch
src/api/auth/refresh.test.ts — mock Payload with vi.fn(), vi.mock('@/getPayload'), real JWT token creation via jwtService.signRefreshToken() for refresh flow tests
src/api/auth/logout.test.ts — tests logout clearing refreshToken via mockPayload.update assertion
src/api/auth/register.test.ts — tests full register→login flow with chained mockPayload.find.mockResolvedValueOnce() calls
src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts — makeAuthenticatedContext() helper pattern for creating tokens and sessions in tests
